items.title: Ranking the 6 LeBron James Suitors, and What is Going on in Denver? | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: It’s 2010 all over again. LeBron James is a free agent and is choosing between six teams. We rank them and their fits for him. Also, we discuss the Nuggets’ silence and what it entails. And we catch up on other transactions around the league. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter:…

items.title: My favorite (and least favorite) moves from a wild week
items.body_excerpt: I knew a 10-day international trip around the start of free agency was risky, but never in my wildest dreams nor worst nightmares did I expect to see so many of the league’s biggest names moving! Japan was great fun, thanks for asking. Aside from waking up every morning to a…

items.title: Congrats to the Sixers, who now need to figure some stuff out
